user.title: Log in to Tracksolid Pro
user.description: Sign in with your Tracksolid Pro account credentials. No API key registration is required — just use the same email and password you use to log in to the Tracksolid Pro app.

data_description.region: Choose the region that matches your Tracksolid Pro account. If you are unsure, try Europe first.

devices.title: Select devices to track
devices.description: Choose which devices you want to track in Home Assistant.

error.invalid_auth: Incorrect email or password. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Tracksolid Pro server. Check your region selection and internet connection.
error.no_devices: No devices found for this account.
error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
